title: EvidenceManifest
description: Evidence manifest that provides chain-of-custody for acquisition artifacts — tracking provenance, integrity, and audit trails from source ingestion through normalization.

manifest_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence manifest.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact this manifest provides evidence for.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of manifest creation.

provenance_chain.description: Ordered list of provenance links forming the chain of custody.

integrity_checksums.description: Cryptographic checksums of the artifact content at each stage.

witness_signatures.description: Digital signatures from witnesses attesting to the artifact's integrity.

metadata.description: Additional contextual metadata for the manifest.

ProvenanceLink.title: ProvenanceLink
ProvenanceLink.description: A single step in the provenance chain, documenting transformation or transfer of the artifact.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this provenance step.

actor.description: Entity (service, process, person) that performed the action.

input_checksum.description: Checksum of the input before the action.

output_checksum.description: Checksum of the output after the action.

details.description: Action-specific details (e.g. HTTP status, transformation parameters).
